INSERT INTO public_records_requests (title, agency, description, date_sent, status, public_status) VALUES
('Sheriff Public Records Request R019298-111424', 'Washoe County Sheriff''s Office — Records Center', 'Public records request filed November 14, 2024. Response/email located in record set dated December 9, 2024.', '2024-11-14', 'partial_response', 1),
('FOIA Request — Case CR23-0657 records', 'Washoe County', 'FOIA request filed September 28, 2024. Exact agency and response status require source review.', '2024-09-28', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('FOIA Requests 1–6', 'Washoe County', 'Six FOIA requests filed October 3, 2024. Multiple requests for case-related records.', '2024-10-03', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('FOIA Requests — November 2024 batch', 'Washoe County', 'Three FOIA requests filed November 6, 2024 (FOIA, FOIA 2, FOIA 3).', '2024-11-06', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Request for transparency and records regarding CR23-0657', 'Washoe County', 'Request for transparency and records specifically regarding case CR23-0657. Filed November 8, 2024.', '2024-11-08', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Follow-up on public information request', 'Washoe County', 'Follow-up communication on prior public information request filed November 15, 2024.', '2024-11-15', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Public accountability, procedural misconduct — FOIA Requests 1–3', 'Washoe County', 'Three FOIA requests filed December 9, 2024 addressing public accountability and procedural misconduct concerns in CR23-0657.', '2024-12-09', 'awaiting_response', 1);
